ddls:
CREATE TABLE "co2_emissions" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reported data */,
  "total_co2_emissions" REAL /* Total CO2 emissions from energy use in metric tons */,
  "transportation" REAL /* CO2 emissions from transportation in metric tons */,
  "coal" REAL /* CO2 emissions from coal in metric tons */,
  "natural_gas" REAL /* CO2 emissions from natural gas in metric tons */,
  "electricity" REAL /* CO2 emissions from electricity in metric tons */,
  "petroleum" REAL /* CO2 emissions from petroleum in metric tons */,
  "motor_gasoline" REAL /* CO2 emissions from motor gasoline in metric tons */,
  "hydrocarbon_liquids" REAL /* CO2 emissions from hydrocarbon gas liquids in metric tons */,
  "jet_fuel" REAL /* CO2 emissions from jet fuel in metric tons */,
  "distillate_fuel_oil" REAL /* CO2 emissions from distillate fuel oil in metric tons */,
  "residual_fuel_oil" REAL /* CO2 emissions from residual fuel oil in metric tons */,
  "lubricants" REAL /* CO2 emissions from lubricants in metric tons */,
  "aviation_gas" REAL /* CO2 emissions from aviation gas in metric tons */,
  "industrial" REAL /* CO2 emissions from industrial sector in metric tons */,
  "residential" REAL /* CO2 emissions from residential sector in metric tons */,
  "commercial" REAL /* CO2 emissions from commercial sector in metric tons */,
  "emission_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of emissions (e.g., CO2, Methane) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the emissions data */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Link to the corresponding upload event */,
  "total_co2_emissions_tons" REAL /* Total CO2 emissions in tons */,
  "total_co2_emissions_mt" REAL /* Total CO2 emissions in million tons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co2_emissions_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES data_uploads ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co2_emissions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co2_emissions_emission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_type_id") REFERENCES emission_types ("emission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Transportation, Industrial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector's role in emissions */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Parent sector for hierarchical relationships */,
  "sector_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for emissions data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_types" (
  "emission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the emission type */,
  "emission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission type (e.g., CO2, Methane) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission type */,
  "emission_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the emission type (e.g., greenhouse gases, air pollutants) */,
  "emission_type_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the emission type (e.g., metric tons, pounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., EPA, DOE) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report generated */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector associated with the report */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year associated with the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "user_organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "user_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality check */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "check_result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES co2_emissions ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date of the upload */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which data was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the uploaded data */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_logs" (
  "integrity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrity check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the integrity check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., good, issues found) */,
  "issues_found" TEXT /* Details of any issues found during the check */,
  "issue_category" TEXT /* Category of the issues found (e.g., data inconsistencies, formatting errors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integrity_id")
)
